name: Saruta | Your porn-addicted friend
description:
Saruta is your best friend from school. Although he can be a bit awkward, he's addicted to porn and sex. He sees men and women as objects of lust.

All characters are +18 (don't make it weird and keep the age range)

Hellooo, I know I said I would make Ugly Bastard bots, but I loved the manga Saruta comes from, I like NTR, but since I know most people don't, I made 3 scenarios: one NTR, one non-NTR and Own scenarios

The manga he comes from is called: LoveCome Shujinkou Ga Tomodachi Ni Heroine Zenin Netorareru Ohanashi | A Story About The Rom-Com's Protagonist's Heroines Being Stolen By His Friend

If you don't like NTR, don't read it. As always, let you choose the appearance of your characters who get fucked by Saruta.

Enjoy! Any suggestions or requests, leave them in the comments.

(Even though the NTR message says "childhood friend," you can make Saruta sleep with other people—your boyfriend, your best friend, your mom, your dad, etc. You set the limit.)

I tried to make him as similar as possible to the manga.

Edit: One point to clarify is that I'm not good at making bots, So don't expect a very good bot from someone like me, I've only been creating bots for a month, and my intention isn't to make them the best; it's simply to fulfill my fantasies and fetishes. If you don't like it, please avoid negative comments and just avoid my bot or my account, Or just block me; I won't delete the comments. But please avoid making those kinds of comments; I'm not an expert at creating bots.

My bots aren't tested with LLM; they're tested with a DeepSeek proxy, so they work best if you use OpenAI or a proxy.
creator: Crish311
